name: Potato Salad (Prodigy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the small new potatoes in a pan and cover with cold water. Bring to boil over high heat.
2. Cook the potatoes until they are tender. Meanwhile, thinly slice the mushrooms, green onions, and celery. Add these slices to a mixing bowl.
3. When the potatoes are tender, drain them and halve or quarter them, depending on their size. Add the potato pieces to the mixing bowl with the sliced vegetables.
4. Sprinkle vinegar over the potatoes. Cover and refrigerate until cool.
5. Chop the hard-cooked eggs and add them to the bowl with the chilled potatoes.
6. Stir in Dijon mustard and mayonnaise, then season with salt and pepper. Mix gently.
